data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) shared its financial performance for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the company offered financial forecasts for the second quarter and full year of 2026. Detailed guidance can be accessed on ILPT’s website in the Quarterly Results section: https://www.ilptreit.com/investors/financials-information/quarterly-results/default.aspx. A conference call has been scheduled for Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Participants can obtain further information about the call on the company's website.

data.title: Invitation Homes Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. unveiled its financial and operational results for the First Quarter of 2026. The company reported a total revenue boost of 8.8% from last year, reaching $734 million. At the same time, property operating and maintenance costs rose by 5.8% to $251 million. Despite this, the net income available to common stockholders saw a decrease of 3.5% to $160 million, equivalent to $0.26 per share. Invitation Homes Inc. is recognized as the leading single-family home leasing and management firm in the United States.

data.title: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York, Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company reported a GAAP net income of $12.3 million, equivalent to $0.07 per diluted common share. Their Distributable Earnings, a non-GAAP financial metric, amounted to $13.5 million, translating to $0.09 per diluted common share on a fully converted basis. Furthermore, the Distributable Earnings before realized losses, another non-GAAP financial measure, stood at $25.9 million.

data.title: Amrize Grows Revenue 4.7% in First Quarter and Reaffirms 2026 Guidance
data.description: Amrize (AMRZ) reported its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. Jan Jenisch, the Chairman and CEO, expressed gratitude towards the 19,000 Amrize employees for achieving a 4.7% revenue growth during this seasonally small quarter. The company is pleased with the progress made and the increasing customer demand in Building Materials. Amrize experienced growth in new project initiations and secured multi-year supply contracts for mega-projects, leading to a significant advancement.

data.title: Redwood Trust Reports First Quarter Financial Results; Mortgage Banking Production Reaches a Record $8.5 Billion
data.description: Redwood Trust, Inc., a key player in improving housing accessibility for homebuyers and renters, released its financial outcomes for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The consolidated data showcased a GAAP net loss of $(0.07) for each basic and diluted common share. Meanwhile, Non-GAAP Earnings Available for Distribution ("EAD") saw a rise to $0.21 per share(1), surpassing the previous quarter. These figures demonstrate the company's commitment to financial growth and sustainability in the housing sector.

data.title: Green Brick Partners, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Green Brick Partners, Inc. announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The net income attributable to Green Brick during this period was $60.9 million, leading to diluted earnings of $1.39 per share. The company successfully delivered 908 homes in Q1. Additionally, they received 1,037 net new sales orders during the same quarter. The monthly sales pace for the quarter slightly declined to 3.4, as opposed to the previous figure of 3.

data.title: 770 million Euros raised through a securitization backed by German auto leases by RCI Banque.
data.description: Recently, it was reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached over 500,000, with a daily increase of approximately 10,000 cases. Unfortunately, the death toll has also risen to more than 10,000. The government has imposed strict measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing and social distancing guidelines. Hospitals are currently overwhelmed, with over 5,000 patients in critical condition. The situation is dire, and healthcare professionals are working tirelessly to treat the increasing number of patients. Economic repercussions are also being felt, with unemployment reaching over 15% due to the lockdown measures.Officials are urging the public to adhere to safety protocols to prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: The St. Joe Company Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Declares a Quarterly Dividend of $0.16 Per Share
data.description: Panama City Beach, Florida - The St. Joe Company has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, along with announcing a quarterly dividend of $0.16 per share.

data.title: EnerSys Announces Date of Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Financial Results Release and Conference Call
data.description: EnerSys, a leading company in stored energy solutions for industrial use, shared that it will reveal its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal year 2026, concluding on March 31, 2026. The announcement is scheduled to occur after the market closes on May 20, 2026. Those interested can access the press release and presentation slides on the Investor Relations page of EnerSys’ website at www.investor.enersys.com. Additionally, a conference will be held by the Company to discuss the results.

data.title: Sabra Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; Reiterates 2026 Guidance
data.description: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc., based in Tustin, California, released its first quarter 2026 financial results. In this period, the company reported the following figures per diluted common share: Net Income at $0.16, Funds From Operations (FFO) at $0.37, Normalized FFO at $0.38, Adjusted FFO (AFFO) at $0.39, and Normalized AFFO at $0.39. The EBITDARM coverage summary included 2.46x for Skilled Nursing/Transitional Care and 1.58x for Senior Housing - Leased. This data showcases Sabra's performance in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Caesarstone Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In MP Menashe, Israel, Caesarstone Ltd. (NASDAQ: CSTE), a prominent maker of premium engineered surfaces, revealed plans to unveil its Q1 earnings for the period ending March 31, 2026, on May 13, 2026, before the market opens. They will hold a webcast and conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to review the results. The live webcast will be available on the Investor Relations portion of the Company’s website.

data.title: The Cheesecake Factory Reports Results for First Quarter of Fiscal 2026
data.description: In Calabasas Hills, Calif., The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated (NASDAQ: CAKE) released its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 ending on March 31, 2026. Total revenues amounted to $978.8 million, marking an increase from $927.2 million in the first quarter of fiscal 2025. The net income for this quarter was $49.5 million, with diluted net income per share at $1.02. Additionally, the Company reported a pre-tax net expense.

data.title: Bel announces Q1 2026 financial results.
data.description: The recent data reveals that around 15% of the population in the country is currently unemployed. This number translates to approximately 30 million people who are without employment. This figure indicates a significant increase from the previous year when the unemployment rate was at 10%. The government has expressed concerns about the impact of these high levels of unemployment on the economy and is considering implementing measures to address the issue. Additionally, the data shows that the youth unemployment rate is even higher, with nearly 25% of individuals between the ages of 18 and 30 being unemployed. Efforts are being made to create more job opportunities for this demographic to combat the alarming rate of youth unemployment.

data.title: Notice of Proposed Settlement of Stockholder Derivative Action: Maison Solutions Inc.
data.description: Monterey Park, California - On April 29, 2026, Maison Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ:MSS) announced the notification of a proposed settlement regarding derivative actions along with a scheduled settlement hearing.

data.title: Athene Holding Ltd. Declares Second Quarter 2026 Preferred Stock Dividends
data.description: On April 29, 2026 in West Des Moines, Iowa, Athene declared dividends for its non-cumulative preferred stock. These dividends are payable on June 30, 2026 to shareholders of record as of June 15, 2026. Each depositary share represents a 1/1,000th interest in a preferred stock share.
